title: clerodendrum johnstonii
intro: Clerodendrum johnstonii, also known as Johnston's Glory Bower or Johnston's Glory Vine, is a flowering plant species within the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in its leaves, which contain various medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Clerodendrum johnstonii has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum johnstonii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
